mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce discount rates on equity cash flows, directly boosting S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 7.5 percent, labor market tightening accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 7.5.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with declining consumer credit balances signals a supply-demand rebalancing that reduces inflationary pressure while sustaining corporate earnings, yielding positive 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint rank IC of INDPRO and RSAFS remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns do not differ significantly from baseline when both series move in opposite directions.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening monetary cycle, rising federal funds rates combined with contracting real GDP growth compress equity valuations, producing negative 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in over 60% of triggered tightening episodes despite contracting GDP.

mechanism_narrative: Continuous month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls signals expanding economic activity, which mechanically supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of PAYEMS month-over-month change against 5-day forward SPX returns remains below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When new housing starts exceed 900 thousand units, it signals robust construction demand and consumer confidence, triggering positive equity returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day forward returns in more than 50% of months where HOUST crosses above 900.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising consumer credit balances and falling federal funds rates indicates leveraged consumption fueling near-term earnings growth, generating positive 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns do not exhibit a statistically significant positive spread when RSAFS rises and FEDFUNDS falls compared to periods where both series move in the same direction.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of elevated inflation, rising industrial production fails to offset price pressures, leading to real rate hikes that compress equity multiples and drive negative 5-day forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in over 55% of inflationary episodes where INDPRO rises alongside CPIAUCSL.
